name: Node.js PostgreSQL Sequelize Mocha Starter
description: A Node.js starter template with a RESTful API, PostgreSQL database integration using Sequelize, and a complete testing setup with Mocha and Chai, along with modern development tooling.
features: Sequelize ORM for database modeling and queries
Mocha and Chai configured for testing
Babel transpilation for modern JavaScript (ES6+) support
Linting with ESLint and formatting with Prettier
